name: line-chart
title: LineChart
description: A line chart whose path draws on left-to-right on the house easing, with an optional soft area fill and per-point dots that pop as the line reaches them. Deterministic via SVG pathLength normalization.
pickWhen: a trend over time — growth, drop, before/after curve. Use `bar-chart` for discrete comparisons, `count-up` for a single end value.
